test_title: impression beacon se envía solo una vez por display (idempotente)
suite_title: Pause Ad VAST — Beacons de tracking
error_message:
expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)

Expected: >= 1
Received:    0

Call Log:
- Timeout 10000ms exceeded while waiting on the predicate
root_cause: Same root cause as impression-beacon-fired failure. The develop build has no pauseAd state machine; the first expect.poll() on impressionBeacons.length times out at 10 s because no beacon is ever fired, halting the test before the idempotency assertion is even reached.
suspected_cause: Test assumes the overlay and beacon firing occur; neither happens because the feature branch is unmerged.
